prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为46803→43271→44111→42177→41632，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字减小），近3年累计前移约2400名；2025年基准 位次约41632名；该校在贵州省物理类招生计划2021年3439人、2022年3546人、2023年3351人、2024年3562人、2025年3706人；2026年计划大幅增至4933 人，较2025年扩招约33%，显著增加招生名额，对竞争压力有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第135名持续上升至2026年第85 名，排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度逐年增强；2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要因招聘公告设置不当条件引发舆情，学校已终止招聘并致歉；抖 音热度排名第76位（综合热度341363），评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量中等，未出现明显报考热度信号；第五轮学科评估中植物保护获评A-，为该校唯一A- 及以上学科，与植物生产类、农学等招生专业直接关联，对相关农林类专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热 推荐，贵州大学在上述领域设有对应专业；贵州省2026年高考总人数约299000人，较2025年（约297258人）略有增加，按2025年物理类占比69.7%估算，2026年物理类考生约20.8 万人，竞争基数小幅扩大；贵州大学位于贵阳市，是贵州省唯一211高校，在本省招生占比极高，2025年物理类本省计划3706人 ，占当年总计划绝大部分，本省考生报考意愿强烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次前移趋势、2026年大幅扩招33%对竞争压力的缓解、学校排名持续上升带来的吸引力增强、以 及本省考生总数小幅增加等因素，但考虑到学校层次提升和工科专业热度对报考的拉动作用。预测2026 年物理类最低位次约49703名，区间49203-50203名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 46803 → 43271 → 44111 → 42177 → 41632, showing a fluctuating upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative advance of about 2400 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 41632; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guizhou Province was 3439 in 2021, 3546 in 2022, 3351 in 2023, 3562 in 2024, and 3706 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 4933, an expansion of about 33% compared to 2025, notably increasing enrollment slots, which alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science China University Ranking has steadily risen from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, with continuously improving comprehensive strength and recognition; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to inappropriate conditions set in a recruitment announcement causing public opinion backlash, but the university has terminated the recruitment and apologized; Douyin popularity ranking is 76th (comprehensive popularity 341363), rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms, showing no obvious application heat signal; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Plant Protection was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly related to enrollment majors such as Plant Production and Agriculture, providing some support for related agriculture and forestry majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular and recommended, and Guizhou University offers corresponding majors in these fields; the total number of Gaokao examinees in Guizhou Province in 2026 is about 299,000, a slight increase from about 297,258 in 2025; based on the 2025 Physics Category proportion of 69.7%, the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in 2026 is about 208,000, with a slightly expanded competition base; Guizhou University is located in Guiyang City, the only 211 university in Guizhou Province, with a very high proportion of enrollment within the province; in 2025, the provincial plan for Physics Category was 3706, accounting for the vast majority of the total plan that year, and local examinees have a strong willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical upward trend in rankings, the alleviation of competitive pressure from the significant 33% expansion in 2026, the increased attractiveness from the university's continuously rising ranking, and the slight increase in the total number of local examinees, but also taking into account the pulling effect of the university's level improvement and the popularity of engineering majors on applications. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 49703, with a range of 49203-50203.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2023, the minimum liberal arts ranking was approximately 10093 → 9978 → 10023. After the 2024 college entrance examination reform, the history category ranking was 6523, and in 2025 it was 6539. The ranking systems before and after the reform differ (arts/science division → 3+1+2). In 2024, the history category ranking moved significantly forward compared to the liberal arts period, and in 2025 it remained basically the same as in 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 6539. The university's history category enrollment plan in Guizhou Province was 528 in 2021, 565 in 2022, 576 in 2023, 524 in 2024, and 482 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly increased to 722, an expansion of about 50% compared to 2025, with a notable increase in enrollment slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. The Soft Science ranking has steadily risen from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, indicating a continuous improvement in ranking and enhanced comprehensive strength. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to public opinion triggered by a recruitment announcement controversy. The Douyin popularity ranking is 76th (comprehensive popularity 341363), with an evaluation of 'average', showing no obvious abnormal signal in application popularity. Plant Protection received an A- rating, the only A- or above discipline at the university, but it is not directly related to history category enrollment majors. The main history category enrollment majors are Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism, and other liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language/Literature are socially popular, with clear advantages for civil service exams. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Guizhou Province is approximately 299,000. Based on the 2025 history category proportion of 30.3%, it is estimated that there will be about 90,600 history category examinees in 2026, basically the same as in 2025 (90,087). Guizhou University is the only 211 university in Guizhou Province, with a very high proportion of history category enrollment in the province. In 2025, the history category provincial plan was 482, and local examinees have a strong willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking, the significant easing of competition pressure due to the 50% expansion in 2026, the increased attractiveness from the university's rising ranking, and the basically stable number of history category examinees. Also taking into account the pulling effect of the high popularity of liberal arts majors like Law on applications. It is predicted that the minimum history category ranking in 2026 will be approximately 8392, with a range of 7892-8892.
